highlights: Handbook Ch 18.5 + §6.16 adopted before schema code (gate honored)
packages/db: full Ch 19 schema, forced per-table-tested RLS, §18.5.7 ledger, proven against real Postgres+pgvector locally and in CI
packages/orchestration: three intakes, tier routing, external-action wrapper with audit-before-dispatch + degrade-to-asking, restart-survival proven against the memoization contract
learnings: Fresh-context adversarial review caught P1s in all three passes that structured checklist review missed (Build 0: release-on-ambiguous; Build 1: withFounderContext superuser bypass; Build 2: pending-claim swallow). Make it a standing gate.
Never judge a command by piped tail output — `npm run typecheck | tail` masked a failing workspace for half the session; check exit codes.
'pending' and 'ambiguous' ledger states are epistemically identical after a crash: both mean 'the world may have been contacted'. Reconciliation must treat them the same.
Make ambiguity a step VALUE not a thrown error, so surfacing doesn't depend on retry budgets.
Homebrew postgresql@17 postinstall can fail (unlinked lib/share); manual symlinks + scratch-cluster receipt recorded in packages/db/README.md.
debt: Vercel 'staging' deploy job targets preview env (needs an ops decision)
Reconciliation event id needs an incident nonce once a reconciler that releases claims exists (comment in external-action.ts)
Live Inngest dev-server e2e deferred to first deployed environment
next: Build 3 — Public Knowledge corpus & grounding (see docs/handoffs/build-3-handoff.md)
